meaning: adj.安全的,可靠的,放心的,无虑的v.保护
examples: Double-check that the ladder is secure.
Swaddle your newborn baby so that she feels secure.
Our objective must be to secure a peace settlement.
Results show he easily cleared the benchmark of 1, 144 delegates to secure the nomination.
She blames companies that make unrealistic demands without providing secure ways to meet those expectations.
